# NoteBranch (Full Context)

## Product summary
NoteBranch is a free and open-source desktop application for Markdown-first note and knowledge workflows.

## Storage modes
- Git repositories
- AWS S3 buckets (including prefix support)
- Local-only repository mode

## Core workflow
1. Connect provider and configure profile.
2. Create/edit Markdown notes in editor, preview, or split view.
3. Sync through provider-specific operations.
4. Review history and restore references.
5. Export individual notes or full repository zip archives.

## Project links
